channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In Taylor Swift's beach town, every clue becomes a wedding rumor
Access full 2026 episode transcripts of 'Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan'
item.description: View all complete transcripts from 2026 episodes of 'Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan.'

item.title: Seven dead, dozens wounded in series of weekend shootings across Chicago
item.description: Police report at least 38 injuries and seven fatalities from shootings in Chicago since Friday evening.

item.title: Three killed as private plane crashes into Maryland woods, officials say
item.description: A single-engine Piper Cherokee crashed in Bowie, Maryland, killing the three men on board.
